data.body: Investigation findings (pre-dispatch): (1) Migration marker .claude/.brainstorm-tag-migration-v1 does NOT exist — migration has never run in this repo. (2) 87 open epics: 27 have children (i.e., went through preplanning), but only 2 are tagged brainstorm:complete. (3) Of those 27, 15 have PIL heading present (migration WOULD tag them if it ran) and 12 have children but NO literal PIL heading (migration would NOT tag them even if it ran). User confirms: epics-with-children should be considered brainstormed regardless of literal PIL heading.
